name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch - Chicken Chunks in Gravy 85g
description: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch - Chicken Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4,5 Crude Fiber (%) -0.3 Moisture (%) -83 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin E (Min) - 15 mg/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 250 IU/kg Copper -1 mg/kg Manganese -1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Biotin - 20g/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Chicken 5% min.), minerals, inulin (0.1%).
